data.title: Charlie Munger Once Said, 'The Market Won't Do Exactly What You Want, When You Want' — As Tariff Jitters And Wild Swings Remind Investors Why Long-Term Thinking Matters
data.description: Charlie Munger's past warning that markets won't shift on an investor's schedule serves as a stark reminder amid today's tariff-driven volatility and short-term panic.

data.title: Bitcoin Is A 'More Liquid And Higher Volatility Version Of Gold': Bernstein
data.description: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) is increasingly behaving like a high-volatility, liquid version of gold, according to Bernstein analysts.

data.title: Jim Cramer Cautions Against Jumping In As Oversold Market Sparks Futures Rebound Without Clear Catalyst: 'Is It All A Big Trap?'
data.description: As indices have moved into the oversold territory, led by the tariff-fueled selloff, Jim Cramer has questioned the Tuesday up move in futures.

data.title: UnitedHealth Stock Up Over 4% After Key Signal, Amid Market Turmoil
data.description: Even as Tariff-induced volatility reigns in the market, UnitedHealth shares rallied up to more than 4% after this key trading signal.

data.title: Marvell Offloads Auto Ethernet Segment To Infineon Tech For $2.5 Billion Cash
data.description: Marvell Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ: MRVL) to sell Automotive Ethernet business to Infineon Technologies AG (OTC: IFNNY) for $2.5 billion in cash.
